title: About Me - Lucas Domingues Santos
resumeText1: I have 3 years of experience in QA, building a solid career and working on complex and challenging projects. At Foursys, I worked for 1 year and 8 months with the Bradesco client, where I was responsible for manual and functional testing in important areas such as bill payments and creating MEI/EI/EIRELI accounts in the bank's app. I acted as the only QA in the team, managing and executing all test stages.
resumeText2: Currently, I work at Logbank, a payment processor that offers solutions for renting card machines and managing retail sales. In addition to manual and functional testing, I developed automations for repetitive scenarios using Cypress and JavaScript, which brought more agility and efficiency to the validation process.
resumeText3: I have knowledge in front-end development (HTML, CSS, and JavaScript), which I have been studying for years. This helps me identify the root cause of bugs more quickly and accurately, which speeds up the resolution process. I usually take a structured approach to testing: I start by reading and analyzing the project's stories, writing test cases, and then performing validation with the product team to ensure they meet the requirements.
resumeText4: My experience, combined with knowledge in automation and development, allows me to work comprehensively, tackling the technical and strategic challenges of software development with confidence and efficiency.
